retry_reason: The put always executes unconditionally and is a release operation; retrying would double-put and cause use-after-free.
contract_summary: Releases one reference to a btrfs_block_group by calling btrfs_put_block_group. If delalloc is true, also releases the data_rwsem read lock before putting. After calling, the caller must not access the block group pointer as the reference is dropped and the object may be freed. This is the release side of get/release pair: the caller must have previously acquired a valid reference (e.g., via btrfs_get_block_group) and must call this function exactly once for each acquired reference. The function does not transfer ownership; it releases it.
